title: SELRANGE lint error only check the bits, not outer packed dimensions

features.name: out-of-bounds index on outer dimension of packed array
features.description: Code should include an out-of-bounds index access on the outer dimension of a multi-dimensional packed array

features.name: multi-dimensional packed array indexing
features.description: Code should include a 2D packed array being indexed to demonstrate incomplete SELRANGE checking across dimensions
features.snippet:
input logic [3:0][3:0] i1;
assign o1 = i1[4];
